title: Radha Krishna Mantra
intro: Read the Radha Krishna Mantra with meaning. Chant this supreme mantra to receive the grace of Radha Krishna.
description:
Main Mantra

Om Hreem Shreem Radhikayai Namah.
or
Om Kleem Krishnaya Namah.

English Meaning

Om,
I bow to
Radiant and glorious
Radha Rani.
or
Om,
I bow to
Lord Krishna,
who attracts
all living beings.

faq.q1: When should Radha Krishna Mantra be chanted?
faq.a1: Radha Krishna Mantra can be chanted with devotion in the morning, evening, or at any auspicious time.
faq.q2: How many times should Radha Krishna Mantra be chanted?
faq.a2: It is commonly chanted 11, 21, 51, or 108 times.
faq.q3: What are the benefits of chanting Radha Krishna Mantra?
faq.a3: According to Hindu tradition, chanting this mantra is believed to bring love, devotion, inner peace, and the blessings of Radha Rani and Lord Krishna.
faq.q4: Can anyone chant Radha Krishna Mantra?
faq.a4: Yes, anyone may chant Radha Krishna Mantra with faith and devotion.
faq.q5: Can Radha Krishna Mantra be chanted daily?
faq.a5: Yes, Radha Krishna Mantra can be chanted every day with devotion.
